# Lando Events

> Community events, meetups, talks, and learning opportunities from Lando Alliance.

The canonical production URL for this site is https://www.lando.dev/events/.

## Primary Content

- [Events](https://www.lando.dev/events/): Lando community events and presentations.
- [Full LLM Context](https://www.lando.dev/events/llms-full.txt): expanded machine-readable context for this site.
- [Changelog](https://www.lando.dev/events/CHANGELOG.html): release history for the events site.
- [Source Repository](https://github.com/lando/events): source code and event data for this subsite.
- [Event Data](https://github.com/lando/events/blob/main/events.yaml): YAML source for event records.

## Related Lando Resources

- [Lando](https://www.lando.dev/): main Lando website.
- [Lando Mission](https://www.lando.dev/mission): organizational mission and background.
- [Lando Blog](https://www.lando.dev/blog): articles and updates.
- [Lando Support](https://www.lando.dev/support): support resources.
- [Lando Docs](https://docs.lando.dev): technical documentation.
- [GitHub Sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/lando): direct sponsorship link.

## Notes For Agents

This site is a VuePress-powered subsite whose public path is `/events/`.
The event list is generated from `events.yaml`.
Use the production URLs above when citing public content.
Treat this file and `llms-full.txt` as static metadata that should be reviewed when site content, navigation, canonical URLs, or event data semantics change.
